+{

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "keda: Apache Pulsar Scaler",
+    "description": "Apache Pulsar Scaler. Requested by 17+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current keda deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your keda version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nhelm list -n keda 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working keda installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review keda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant keda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda\n```\nThis is a request for an Apache Pulsar (https://github.com/apache/pulsar) scalar so that Keda users can integrate with Pulsar."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Apache Pulsar Scaler",
+        "description": "No worries at all, take your time!\n\nWe are always happy to help on the Kubernetes Slack or you can follow this doc: https://github.com/kedacore/keda/blob/master/CREATE-NEW-SCALER.md\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Apache Pulsar Scaler\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "No worries at all, take your time!\n\nWe are always happy to help on the Kubernetes Slack or you can follow this doc: https://github.com/kedacore/keda/blob/master/CREATE-NEW-SCALER.md",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
